description:
Create four supplier records for the university's primary IT vendors in Snipe-IT, then update five existing hardware assets with the correct supplier assignment and purchase order number.

Suppliers to Create:
1. Dell Technologies (Address: One Dell Way, City: Round Rock, State: TX, Zip: 78682, Country: US, Contact: Michael Dell, Phone: 1-800-456-3355, Email: enterprise-sales@dell.com, URL: https://www.dell.com, Notes: Primary laptop and desktop vendor. University discount code: EDU-2024-DELL)
2. CDW Education (Address: 200 N. Milwaukee Ave, City: Vernon Hills, State: IL, Zip: 60061, Country: US, Contact: Sarah Mitchell, Phone: 1-800-800-4239, Email: highered@cdw.com, URL: https://www.cdw.com, Notes: Authorized Apple and peripheral reseller. Net 30 terms.)
3. SHI International (Address: 290 Davidson Ave, City: Somerset, State: NJ, Zip: 08873, Country: US, Contact: James Chen, Phone: 1-888-764-8888, Email: education-team@shi.com, URL: https://www.shi.com, Notes: Software licensing and server procurement. State contract EDU-NJ-2023.)
4. Cisco Systems (Address: 170 West Tasman Drive, City: San Jose, State: CA, Zip: 95134, Country: US, Contact: Patricia Lopez, Phone: 1-800-553-6387, Email: university-accounts@cisco.com, URL: https://www.cisco.com, Notes: Networking equipment and SmartNet support contracts.)

Asset Updates (assign to supplier and update order number):
- PROC-001: Assign to Dell Technologies, Order Number PO-2024-0150
- PROC-002: Assign to Dell Technologies, Order Number PO-2024-0150
- PROC-003: Assign to CDW Education, Order Number PO-2024-0175
- PROC-004: Assign to Cisco Systems, Order Number PO-2024-0200
- PROC-005: Assign to SHI International, Order Number PO-2024-0188
